mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM VST_VHCL_RSVT
WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
AND HO_NO LIKE #{aptCmplexNo} || '%'
AND ( VST_YMD + (STAY_HR / 24) >= SYSDATE - 7 )

SELECT *
FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY VST_YMD DESC ) RN
, VST_VHCL_RSVT_NO , VST_VHCL_TY_CD , VST_VHCL_NO , VSTR_NM , VST_YMD , VST_STTS_CD , REG_DT , MDF_DT , VST_PRPS_CN , USER_NO , HO_NO , STAY_HR
FROM VST_VHCL_RSVT
WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
AND HO_NO LIKE #{aptCmplexNo} || '%'
AND ( VST_YMD + (STAY_HR / 24) >= SYSDATE - 7 ) )
WHERE RN BETWEEN #{pagingVO.startRow} AND #{pagingVO.endRow}
ORDER BY VST_YMD DESC, REG_DT DESC
